description_long: This armchair features a modern, minimalist design with a sturdy wooden frame and straight, clean lines. The seat and backrest are generously cushioned and upholstered in a smooth, solid gray fabric, providing both comfort and a contemporary aesthetic. The armrests are crafted from light-colored wood, matching the legs and frame, and are flat and rectangular in shape. The backrest is medium height, straight, and slightly reclined for ergonomic support. The legs are straight, cylindrical, and made of the same light wood as the armrests, giving the chair a cohesive look. The overall appearance is sleek and inviting, suitable for urban parks, sidewalks, or public seating areas.
description: A modern armchair with a light wooden frame, straight armrests, and gray cushioned upholstery. The design is minimalist and comfortable, ideal for urban environments.
description_view_0: Front view shows the wide gray cushioned seat, straight wooden armrests, and the full width of the backrest.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the thickness of the seat and back cushions, as well as the straight, flat wooden armrest and leg structure.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the straight, cushioned backrest and the wooden frame supporting it.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the profile of the armrest, cushion depth, and leg alignment.
